executive.revenue2025Note: Historical annual resmi dari workbook summary
executive.summarySubtitle: Hybrid view: REPORT YTD + Analysis of Store EAR REGION 5 + sales operational
executive.condition: 152 toko Region 5 terbaca di Analysis EAR. Loss pattern terbesar ada di 6 toko, sedangkan profit pattern terbesar ada di 28 toko.
executive.analysis: Pattern dominan profit: PROFIT because their Sales is BELOW , their GP% is BELOW and their OPEX is BELOW. Pattern dominan loss: LOSS because their Sales is ABOVE , their GP% is ABOVE and their OPEX is BELOW.
executive.action: Prioritaskan toko yang masuk loss pattern terbesar, terutama yang sales masih below dan OPEX masih above, lalu tindak lanjutkan per owner dan format toko.

actions.title: Review 25 toko critical
actions.note: Prioritaskan store yang gap BEP paling besar dan P&L final masih negatif.

actions.title: MEGASTORE SUPERMAL KARAWACI - gap Rp3.5 M
actions.note: Store dengan jarak paling jauh dari target BEP bulanannya.

actions.title: 6 toko masuk loss pattern utama
actions.note: LOSS because their Sales is ABOVE , their GP% is ABOVE and their OPEX is BELOW

actions.title: FEBRIAN TRI WIBOWO - 6 toko loss
actions.note: Owner dengan toko rugi terbanyak perlu weekly review khusus.
